content.description: Welcome to my home on the internet! I am a guy who loves robust technology. My current interests are focused on React, Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics regarding sports.

projects.title: projects
projects.subtitle: This website is intended to act as a log of some of my fondest initiatives in the past, present and future. It has borne many iterations of functionality improvements, and will no doubt continue to do so over time, with the last major sprint published on

project_list.title: Political Deepfake
project_list.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence
project_list.description: A deepfake of Justin Trudeau to explore the process and effects of disinformation on the web.

project_list.title: Degree Planner
project_list.subtitle: Web Application
project_list.description: An application that allows students to visually plan out their education. Users interact with dynamic charts that outline necessary courses and their prerequisites for each degree path.

project_list.title: Raspberry Pong
project_list.subtitle: Robotics
project_list.description: Co-engineered a robotic launcher that interacts with motors and sensors in order to detect a red cup on a table. The arm then adjusts all of its angles of trajectory to throw a ping pong ball into the cup with 100% accuracy.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: With the world of technology expanding at an incredible speed with nearly infinite possibilities, my passion for this world constantly leads me to new tools and technologies. Some I like, some I learned to love and some I absolutely loathe.
skills.forward: As my skill set continues to grow, I will update this section with any adjustments. I like to think of this as my ultimate team card, or MyPlayer statline, for the world of software development.
skills.goal: Some new technologies I think are cool and will learn in 2022 are:

content.p1: Technology has been a passion and interest of mine for as long as I can remember. Looking back, I can recall many advancements throughout the decades. Some of my most treasured eras were times filled with CD-ROMs, Nintendo Gamecube and Mapquest directions. However, it is undeniable that the current era of technology is much more convenient and superior, and will only continue to  be so in each coming year, month and even day. I am in constant awe of its developments and work to contribute my own ideas and innovations into its boundless space. Some areas I aim to explore more into are graphic design, data science and prototyping.
content.p2: I was in my undergrad when I recognized the capabilities of the tools which I continue to learn. While earning my Honours in Computer Science at the University of Western Ontario, I was exposed to best software practices and had the opportunity to implement them in numerous projects. My first major team project (Raspberry Pong) remains my favourite to this day. I have yet to forget the professor's awestruck reaction after seeing the hardware and software we built successfully execute 15/15 throws over 5 different cup placements.

icons.description: I like to try new ways of expanding on ideas in order to enhance them.
I enjoy working alongside others and want to help them succeed alongside me.
I quickly develop new skills, while also being able to adapt to new environments.

contact.title: Let's build something awesome together!
contact.subtitle: Send me a message and I'll get back to you shortly.
